definition.value: the natural or legal person, public authority, agency or other body which, alone or jointly with others, determines the purposes and means of the processing of personal data; where the purposes and means of such processing are determined by Union or Member State law, the controller or the specific criteria for its nomination may be provided for by Union or Member State law

classification_rationale: This statement provides the intensional definition of the regulatory term 'controller'.
anchor: ‘controller’ means the natural or legal person, public authority, agency or other body which, alone or jointly with others, determines the purposes and means of the processing of personal data

object.value: the controller or the specific criteria for its nomination

condition.value: where the purposes and means of such processing are determined by Union or Member State law

classification_rationale: This statement grants a permission for Union or Member State law to provide for the controller or its nomination criteria under specific conditions.
anchor: where the purposes and means of such processing are determined by Union or Member State law, the controller or the specific criteria for its nomination may be provided for by Union or Member State law

definition.value: any freely given, specific, informed and unambiguous indication of the data subject's wishes by which he or she, by a statement or by a clear affirmative action, signifies agreement to the processing of personal data relating to him or her

classification_rationale: This paragraph provides the intensional definition of the regulatory term 'consent' of the data subject.
anchor: 'consent' of the data subject means any freely given, specific, informed and unambiguous indication of the data subject's wishes

object.value: his or her personal data

condition.value: the data subject has given consent to the processing of his or her personal data for one or more specific purposes

classification_rationale: This paragraph specifies a condition under which the processing of personal data shall be lawful, making it a deontic permission.
anchor: the data subject has given consent to the processing of his or her personal data for one or more specific purposes

object.value: special categories of personal data

condition.value: the data subject has given explicit consent to the processing of those personal data for one or more specified purposes, except where Union or Member State law provide that the prohibition referred to in paragraph 1 may not be lifted by the data subject

classification_rationale: This paragraph specifies a condition under which the prohibition on processing special categories of personal data does not apply, making it an operative exception.
anchor: the data subject has given explicit consent... except where Union or Member State law provide that the prohibition... may not be lifted

object.value: special categories of personal data

condition.value: processing is necessary for archiving purposes in the public interest, scientific or historical research purposes or statistical purposes in accordance with Article 89(1) based on Union or Member State law which shall be proportionate to the aim pursued, respect the essence of the right to data protection and provide for suitable and specific measures to safeguard the fundamental rights and the interests of the data subject

classification_rationale: This statement specifies a condition under which the prohibition on processing special categories of data does not apply.
anchor: processing is necessary for archiving purposes in the public interest, scientific or historical research purposes or statistical purposes in accordance with Article 89(1)

object.value: special categories of personal data

condition.value: processing is necessary for archiving purposes in the public interest, scientific or historical research purposes or statistical purposes in accordance with Article 89(1) based on Union or Member State law which shall be proportionate to the aim pursued, respect the essence of the right to data protection and provide for suitable and specific measures to safeguard the fundamental rights and the interests of the data subject

classification_rationale: This statement specifies a condition under which the prohibition on processing special categories of data does not apply.
anchor: processing [...] based on Union or Member State law

object.value: the aim pursued

classification_rationale: This statement imposes a requirement on the Union or Member State law permitting the processing.
anchor: law which shall be proportionate to the aim pursued

object.value: the essence of the right to data protection

condition.value: processing is necessary for archiving purposes in the public interest, scientific or historical research purposes or statistical purposes in accordance with Article 89(1)

classification_rationale: This statement imposes a requirement on the Union or Member State law permitting the processing.
anchor: law [...] respect the essence of the right to data protection

predicate.value: be proportionate to the aim pursued
respect the essence of the right to data protection
provide for suitable and specific measures to safeguard

object.value: the essence of the right to data protection
the fundamental rights and the interests of the data subject

condition.value: processing is necessary for archiving purposes in the public interest, scientific or historical research purposes or statistical purposes in accordance with Article 89(1)

classification_rationale: This statement imposes a requirement on the Union or Member State law permitting the processing.
anchor: law [...] provide for suitable and specific measures to safeguard the fundamental rights and the interests of the data subject

object.value: any information referred to in Articles 13 and 14 and any communication under Articles 15 to 22 and 34 relating to processing

condition.value: in a concise, transparent, intelligible and easily accessible form, using clear and plain language, in particular for any information addressed specifically to a child

classification_rationale: This statement imposes an obligation on controllers regarding the manner of providing information and communication.
anchor: The controller shall take appropriate measures to provide any information... in a concise, transparent, intelligible and easily accessible form

object.value: any information referred to in Articles 13 and 14 and any communication under Articles 15 to 22 and 34 relating to processing

condition.value: in writing, or by other means, including, where appropriate, by electronic means

classification_rationale: This statement specifies the required format and means for controllers to provide information.
anchor: The information shall be provided in writing, or by other means, including, where appropriate, by electronic means.

object.value: the information

condition.value: When requested by the data subject, provided that the identity of the data subject is proven by other means

classification_rationale: This statement grants a conditional permission to controllers regarding the mode of information provision.
anchor: When requested by the data subject, the information may be provided orally, provided that the identity of the data subject is proven

predicate.value: shall have the right not to be subject to

object.value: a decision based solely on automated processing, including profiling

condition.value: which produces legal effects concerning him or her or similarly significantly affects him or her

classification_rationale: This statement grants a right to the data subject, making it a DEONTIC provision.
anchor: The data subject shall have the right not to be subject to a decision based solely on automated processing

subject.value: an enterprise or an organisation employing fewer than 250 persons

object.value: The obligations referred to in paragraphs 1 and 2

condition.value: the processing it carries out is likely to result in a risk to the rights and freedoms of data subjects, the processing is not occasional, or the processing includes special categories of data as referred to in Article 9(1) or personal data relating to criminal convictions and offences referred to in Article 10

classification_rationale: This paragraph establishes an exception to existing obligations, making it a deontic statement.
anchor: The obligations referred to in paragraphs 1 and 2 shall not apply to an enterprise or an organisation employing fewer than 250 persons unless...

object.value: the personal data breach
the supervisory authority competent in accordance with Article 55

condition.value: In the case of a personal data breach, without undue delay and, where feasible, not later than 72 hours after having become aware of it, unless the personal data breach is unlikely to result in a risk to the rights and freedoms of natural persons

classification_rationale: This statement imposes an obligation on the controller to notify data breaches to the supervisory authority.
anchor: the controller shall ... notify the personal data breach to the supervisory authority

object.value: reasons for the delay

condition.value: Where the notification to the supervisory authority is not made within 72 hours

classification_rationale: This statement imposes an obligation to provide reasons for delayed notification to the supervisory authority.
anchor: Where the notification ... is not made within 72 hours, it shall be accompanied by reasons for the delay.

object.value: an assessment of the impact of the envisaged processing operations on the protection of personal data

condition.value: Where a type of processing in particular using new technologies, and taking into account the nature, scope, context and purposes of the processing, is likely to result in a high risk to the rights and freedoms of natural persons, prior to the processing

classification_rationale: This statement imposes an obligation on the controller to perform a data protection impact assessment under specific conditions.
anchor: the controller shall, prior to the processing, carry out an assessment of the impact of the envisaged processing operations

predicate.value: may use a single assessment to address

object.value: a set of similar processing operations that present similar high risks

classification_rationale: This statement grants permission for a controller to conduct a single assessment for similar processing operations.
anchor: A single assessment may address a set of similar processing operations that present similar high risks.

predicate.value: be designed and developed in such a way... that they can be effectively overseen

object.value: High-risk AI systems

condition.value: including with appropriate human-machine interface tools, during the period in which they are in use

classification_rationale: This statement imposes an obligation on the design and development of high-risk AI systems to ensure human oversight.
anchor: High-risk AI systems shall be designed and developed... that they can be effectively overseen by natural persons

condition.value: that use Biometrics, in so far as their use is permitted under relevant Union or national law

classification_rationale: This paragraph establishes a condition for the material scope of AI systems that are classified as high-risk.
anchor: Biometrics, in so far as their use is permitted under relevant Union or national law
